basic_details.job_title: JKSSB Draftsman Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 76 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Important Note: Candidates must possess a valid Domicile Certificate of J&K issued on or before the cut-off date (14.05.2026). Reservation shall be applicable as per J&K Reservation Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Two years Draftsman Training Course Certificate/Diploma from any Government recognized Institute
qualification.details: Educational Qualification: Two years Draftsman Training Course Certificate/Diploma from any Government recognized Institute. | Age Limit (as on 01.01.2026):

salary_details.details: Pay Scale: Level-4 (Rs.25,500 – 81,100) for all advertised posts.

selection_process: The selection will be based on Written / OMR Examination only.

Objective Type Multiple Choice Questions. Negative Marking: ¼ of marks assigned to the question. Syllabus will be notified separately on the official website. Final selection on the basis of merit obtained in the Written/OMR Examination.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must apply online through the official JKSSB portal before the last date.

Step 1 – Visit www.jkssb.nic.in and click on the relevant advertisement link. Step 2 – Register using valid email ID and mobile number. Step 3 – Fill the online application form carefully, upload required documents (photograph, signature, category certificate, qualification certificates). Step 4 – Pay the application fee online. Step 5 – Submit the form and take printout for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) Recruitment 2026 under Advertisement No. 02 of 2026?
faq.answer: JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) Recruitment 2026 under Advertisement No. 02 of 2026 is a Divisional Cadre recruitment drive by Jammu and Kashmir Services Selection Board to fill 76 Draftsman (Civil) posts in the Jal Shakti Department, Jammu & Kashmir.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) 2026 Jal Shakti Department?
faq.answer: A total of 76 vacancies of Draftsman (Civil) have been notified, with 33 posts for Divisional Cadre Jammu and 43 posts for Divisional Cadre Kashmir under the Jal Shakti Department.

faq.question: Q3. What are the online application dates for JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application form for JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) 2026 will be available from 15 April 2026 and the last date to apply online is 14 May 2026 through the official website jkssb.nic.in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) 2026?
faq.answer: For JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) Recruitment 2026, candidates must be domiciles of Jammu & Kashmir and possess a two years Draftsman Training Course Certificate or Diploma in Civil from any Government recognised institute as on the prescribed cut‑off date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) Jal Shakti 2026 posts?
faq.answer: The age limit as on 01 January 2026 is 18 to 40 years for Open Merit (OM), 18 to 43 years for reserved categories such as SC, ST‑1, ST‑2, RBA, ALC/IB, EWS and OBC, 18 to 42 years for Physically Challenged persons and up to 48 years for Ex‑Servicemen.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) 2026 is Rs. 600 for General/Open Merit candidates and Rs. 500 for SC, ST‑1, ST‑2, EWS and PwBD candidates, payable only through online payment modes such as debit card, credit card, net banking or e‑challan.

faq.question: Q7. What is the pay scale of JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) Jal Shakti posts in 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) posts in Jal Shakti Department will receive salary in Pay Level‑4 with a pay scale of Rs. 25,500 to Rs. 81,100 as per the 7th CPC pay matrix and applicable allowances of the Jammu & Kashmir Government.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) 2026 recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection for JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) Recruitment 2026 will be based on a written/OMR‑based objective type examination only, consisting of multiple‑choice questions with negative marking of 1/4 marks for each wrong answer, followed by document verification and preparation of final merit list.

faq.question: Q9. Is domicile of Jammu & Kashmir mandatory for JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, only candidates possessing a valid Domicile Certificate of the Union Territory of Jammu & Kashmir issued on or before 14 May 2026 are eligible to apply for the JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) Divisional Cadre posts in Jal Shakti Department.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) Advertisement 02 of 2026 notification and apply online?
faq.answer: Candidates can download the official JKSSB Draftsman (Civil) Advertisement No. 02 of 2026 notification PDF and submit the online application form only through the official JKSSB portal at jkssb.nic.in within the specified dates.
